AddOnInstructionDefinition.Name: Servo_CIP
AddOnInstructionDefinition.RevisionNote: Send MSG to enable hard OT with Command.EnableOT

Parameter.Name: dblManualMultiplierONS
Parameter.Description: Modifies max speed for maintenance mode

Parameter.Name: dblBackoffEOTDistUL
Parameter.Description: Max distance to move off EOT in Recovery

Parameter.Name: dblBackoffEOTOffsetDist
Parameter.Description: Offset to move additional after EOT sensor is off

Parameter.Name: dblBackoffEOTOffsetSpeed
Parameter.Description: Speed for backoff offset in units

Parameter.Name: permInhibitMotion
Parameter.Description: External Permissive to Inhibit Motion Commands

Parameter.Name: intAbsMoveType
Parameter.Description: Move type for MAM absolute commands

Parameter.Name: bitDisableHardEOTRecoveryIfOK
Parameter.Description: If set stage will not move on Hard EOT recovery if status is OK

Parameter.Name: msgDisableEOT
Parameter.Description: msg needed to disable end of travels. Requires controller scope

Parameter.Name: msgDisableEnableInputChecking
Parameter.Description: msg for disabling the enable input checking on first scan. Requires controller scope

Parameter.Name: iMessageTag
Parameter.Description: Internal tag that needs global controller visibility for msg instruction

Parameter.Name: DriveModule
Parameter.Description: The drive module to detect for ethernet loss

LocalTag.Name: bSetupToggleOnOnly
LocalTag.Description: turn me on for setup to disable EOT
